structuredNotes.text: Broker clicks "view contact" button and receives incorporator's full contact data directly
Incorporator simultaneously receives notification showing broker interest and contact volume metrics
Audience visibility metrics should show broker access counts and contact interest levels
Button terminology should change from "ver contato" to "quero falar com gerente de parcerias" for clarity
Incorporators should access platform/app, not brokers, to manage contact requests and broker lists
Neno to refine flow scenarios and create detailed message copy for contact intermediation
DL incorporators receive less frequent, less detailed contact notifications than regular incorporators
Batch messaging approach preferred over individual WhatsApp messages to reduce costs and frequency
App-based notifications should be prioritized over WhatsApp to reduce platform costs
Incentivizing app downloads reduces platform costs compared to WhatsApp-dependent communication
System should detect app installation and send push notifications instead of WhatsApp when possible
Email notification panel within portal could drive users to platform instead of relying solely on WhatsApp
Performance dashboard tab should be fully accessible to DL incorporators with complete broker list visibility
DL incorporators should see significantly less audience visibility than regular incorporators
Audience page should display growth metrics similar to banking apps showing recent increases
Incorporators need perception of increased activity through strategic communication and metrics display
Neno to document adjustments removing friction points for brokers in contact flow
Broker messaging should request permission to share contact information to avoid spam perception
Contact button should be more visible and prominent in portal interface design
Z2 Lite version could be integrated into portal as medium-term feature for broker value perception
Partnership manager contact list should be immediately actionable with WhatsApp integration
Ability to mark contacted brokers in list to track follow-up status
Solution should not punish brokers or create unnecessary friction in contact process
Problem-focused naming preferred over solution-focused naming for epic definition
Alejandro to refine epic naming from "intermediation" to focus on visibility and value perception
Epic must remain small and focused to deliver concrete results quickly
WhatsApp template approved for continuing conversations after 24-hour window expires
Ester's broker outreach in João Pessoa generated 26-27 incorporator referrals in one week
Goal is to convert referred incorporators with high conversion rate through simplified onboarding
Gustavo to conduct outreach test with João Pessoa incorporators to identify process improvements
Previous Espírito Santo test showed in-person relationship building was more effective than remote outreach
Gustavo to coordinate with Laura on contacting 27 João Pessoa incorporators with standardized approach
Gustavo and Laura to refine Ester's outreach to request partnership channel manager contacts instead of general numbers
Diego to identify key broker contacts in each region to support commercial operations
Bruna to share centralized list of key broker contacts by region with Diego
Volume-based approach necessary for scaling but requires understanding objections and barriers
Message copy should emphasize free platform benefits and avoid repetitive sales language
Communication cartilha being developed to standardize messaging across channels and regions
Bruna to align communication guidelines and cartilha updates with Laura and Mayumi
Test approach with 5-7 incorporators initially rather than attempting all 27 simultaneously

markdownContent:
## 1. Ações Acordadas

- [ ] Neno to refine flow scenarios and create detailed message copy for contact intermediation [18:39](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1119)
- [ ] Neno to document adjustments removing friction points for brokers in contact flow [36:52](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2212)
- [ ] Alejandro to refine epic naming from "intermediation" to focus on visibility and value perception [51:47](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3107)
- [ ] Gustavo to coordinate with Laura on contacting 27 João Pessoa incorporators with standardized approach [01:02:46](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3766)
- [ ] Gustavo and Laura to refine Ester's outreach to request partnership channel manager contacts instead of general numbers [01:05:03](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3903)
- [ ] Bruna to share centralized list of key broker contacts by region with Diego [01:06:44](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4004)
- [ ] Bruna to align communication guidelines and cartilha updates with Laura and Mayumi [01:09:12](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4152)

## 2. Fluxo de Contato e Intermediação

- Broker clicks "view contact" button and receives incorporator's full contact data directly [10:54](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=654)
- Incorporator simultaneously receives notification showing broker interest and contact volume metrics [11:11](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=671)
- Button terminology should change from "ver contato" to "quero falar com gerente de parcerias" for clarity [13:27](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=807)
- Incorporators should access platform/app, not brokers, to manage contact requests and broker lists [15:30](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=930)
- DL incorporators receive less frequent, less detailed contact notifications than regular incorporators [19:27](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1167)
- Batch messaging approach preferred over individual WhatsApp messages to reduce costs and frequency [20:07](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1207)
- App-based notifications should be prioritized over WhatsApp to reduce platform costs [21:31](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1291)
- System should detect app installation and send push notifications instead of WhatsApp when possible [22:03](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1323)

## 3. Visibilidade e Percepção de Valor

- Epic should focus on providing contact data visibility and audience perception rather than intermediation [51:47](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3107)
- DL incorporators should see significantly less audience visibility than regular incorporators [34:51](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2091)
- Audience visibility metrics should show broker access counts and contact interest levels [11:45](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=705)
- Performance dashboard tab should be fully accessible to DL incorporators with complete broker list visibility [33:46](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2026)
- Incorporators need perception of increased activity through strategic communication and metrics display [36:30](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2190)

## 4. Melhorias na Interface e Funcionalidades

- Contact button should be more visible and prominent in portal interface design [46:18](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2778)
- Partnership manager contact list should be immediately actionable with WhatsApp integration [49:34](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2974)
- Ability to mark contacted brokers in list to track follow-up status [50:06](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3006)
- Z2 Lite version could be integrated into portal as medium-term feature for broker value perception [46:53](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2813)
- Audience page should display growth metrics similar to banking apps showing recent increases [35:45](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2145)
- Email notification panel within portal could drive users to platform instead of relying solely on WhatsApp [32:10](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1930)

## 5. Estratégia de Incorporadores e Corretores

- Ester's broker outreach in João Pessoa generated 26-27 incorporator referrals in one week [57:55](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3475)
- Goal is to convert referred incorporators with high conversion rate through simplified onboarding [58:31](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3511)
- Test approach with 5-7 incorporators initially rather than attempting all 27 simultaneously [01:10:03](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4203)
- Gustavo to conduct outreach test with João Pessoa incorporators to identify process improvements [58:55](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3535)
- Previous Espírito Santo test showed in-person relationship building was more effective than remote outreach [01:00:45](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3645)
- Diego to identify key broker contacts in each region to support commercial operations [01:05:18](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3918)

## 6. Comunicação e Mensagens

- WhatsApp template approved for continuing conversations after 24-hour window expires [54:37](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3277)
- Message copy should emphasize free platform benefits and avoid repetitive sales language [01:08:41](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4121)
- Communication cartilha being developed to standardize messaging across channels and regions [01:08:53](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4133)
- Broker messaging should request permission to share contact information to avoid spam perception [42:01](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=2521)

## 7. Considerações Estratégicas

- Epic must remain small and focused to deliver concrete results quickly [53:15](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3195)
- Solution should not punish brokers or create unnecessary friction in contact process [50:48](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3048)
- Problem-focused naming preferred over solution-focused naming for epic definition [51:25](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=3085)
- Incentivizing app downloads reduces platform costs compared to WhatsApp-dependent communication [21:39](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=1299)
- Volume-based approach necessary for scaling but requires understanding objections and barriers [01:08:05](/app/meetings/697377d35355be00138a5614?t=4085)
